hooks.command: command -v uv > /dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'WARNING: uv is not installed. This plugin requires uv for dependency management. Run: curl -LsSf https://astral.sh/uv/install.sh | sh'; command -v jq > /dev/null 2>&1 || echo 'WARNING: jq is not installed. Hook scripts require jq for JSON parsing. Install with: brew install jq'
